mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark FROM sys_role WHERE
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark, created_by, updated_by FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_code, role_name, data_scope, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{dataScope}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, data_scope = #{dataScope}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY menu_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu ( role_id, menu_id, created_by, created_at ) VALUES
( #{roleId}, #{menuId}, #{operatorId}, NOW() )
